handover.summary: Replaced phantom repo-to-KW mapping (11 non-existent repos from JADE0009 strategic plan) with VP-seat-based detection module. Upgraded all packages to latest. Fixed zod v3→v4 breaking changes. Added vitest.config.ts for dist/ exclusion (vitest v4 auto-discovers compiled JS tests otherwise).

file.purpose: Type definitions for KW seat system
file.review-notes: Pure types, no runtime code. KWDetectionResult.mapped boolean distinguishes explicit routing from fallback defaults — critical for ROTS bucketing.

file.purpose: Canonical seat definitions + repo-to-KW mapping (single source of truth)
file.review-notes: 13 VP seats (KW-01 through KW-13). Only 5 real repos mapped today. Unmapped repos get KW-00/sonnet/medium defaults. This file grows as new repos are created — no upfront phantom scaffolding. The sto field links to s-team/*.md filenames; null means no STO (CEO, CMO, CSO2, CRO2 currently).

file.purpose: Core KW detection logic — the main deliverable
file.exports: loadSeatsConfig, resetConfigCache, parseStoFrontmatter, deriveEffort, detectKW, detectKWFromCwd, extractRepoSlug, getAllSeats, getSeatByKwId
file.review-notes: - detectKW(repoSlug) is the primary API: repo slug → full KWDetectionResult - detectKWFromCwd() shells out to git for auto-detection - parseStoFrontmatter() uses regex on s-team/*.md YAML frontmatter - Module-level cache for seats.json (resetConfigCache for tests) - import.meta.dirname with __dirname fallback for path resolution - All functions accept optional path overrides for testability

file.purpose: Barrel exports for the kw module
22 tests covering all KW detection functions

test-suites.suite: Mapped repos (knowledge-teams-plugins→KW-02, jade-cofounder→KW-01, dotfiles-claude→KW-13, llms-txt-feed→KW-12), unmapped repos→KW-00, empty string

file.purpose: Exclude dist/ from vitest test discovery
file.review-notes: Required after vitest v2→v4 upgrade. Vitest v4 auto-discovers .test.js in dist/ which causes failures (compiled tests resolve __dirname to dist/).

file.change: exports field: "." and "./kw" pointing to dist/src/jade/kw/index.js
Zod v4 removed ZodTypeDef. Changed inputSchema type from z.ZodType<T, z.ZodTypeDef, unknown> to z.ZodType<T>
Zod v4 renamed .errors to .issues. Changed err.errors.map to err.issues.map and removed explicit type annotation (PropertyKey[] ≠ (string|number)[])
Zod v4 z.record() requires 2 args. Changed z.record(z.unknown()) to z.record(z.string(), z.unknown())

surface.name: knowledge-work-plugins
surface.what-changes: Plugin schemas (plugin.json shape), skill/command markdown format, new upstream plugins added, existing plugin skills renamed/moved.
surface.what-breaks: compose/loader.ts scans upstream plugins directory. compose/resolver.ts merges by name — a renamed upstream plugin becomes a new plugin instead of an override. New upstream plugin.json fields are silently dropped.
surface.detection: Compare upstream commit hash against upstream-ref.json. Diff plugin directory listings. Schema-validate plugin.json against known shape.
surface.mitigation: Pin via upstream-ref.json commit hash. Sync script should: fetch upstream, diff plugin list, run compose, run tests. Fail loudly on new/renamed plugins.

surface.name: claude-code-runtime
surface.what-changes: Claude Code plugin loading behavior, hook execution model (stop-hook.sh), .claude-plugin directory conventions, available MCP tool schemas.
surface.what-breaks: jade-loop stop-hook relies on exit code 0/1 semantics. tweakcc patches depend on Claude Code installation detection. Agent spawning in pro-max mode delegates to Claude Code session which may change its API.
surface.detection: tweakcc.tryDetectInstallation() returns null on breaking changes. Stop-hook failures surface as jade-loop infinite loops or premature exits.
surface.mitigation: tweakcc is pinned at ^4.0.11 (latest). Monitor tweakcc releases. jade-loop stop-hook should log its exit reason to .claude/jade-loop.local.md.

surface.name: anthropic-sdk
surface.what-changes: New model IDs, API parameter changes, SDK method signatures, new features (extended thinking, tool use changes).
surface.what-breaks: src/jade/auth/resolve.ts DEFAULT_MODELS hardcodes model IDs. src/jade/kw/detect.ts deriveEffort() pattern-matches on "opus"/"sonnet"/"haiku". src/jade/agent-sdk/spawn.ts calls SDK methods directly. s-team/*.md STO frontmatter hardcodes model IDs.
surface.detection: npm outdated @anthropic-ai/sdk. Model ID changes need manual review (no automated detection unless API returns 404 on old model IDs).
surface.mitigation: Model IDs are centralized in STO frontmatter + auth resolve defaults. deriveEffort() uses substring matching (opus/sonnet/haiku) which survives version bumps (claude-opus-4-6 → claude-opus-4-7 still matches).

surface.name: zod
surface.what-changes: Zod v4 was a major breaking release (just fixed in this PR).
surface.what-breaks: ZodTypeDef removed, .errors→.issues, z.record() arity change. Any WebMCP tool using zod schemas is affected.
surface.detection: npm outdated zod. Build failures are immediate.
surface.mitigation: Fixed in this commit. Three files touched. All zod usage is in webmcp/shared/ (register.ts, validate.ts) and tool input schemas.

item.title: jade-harness must import from @jadecli/knowledge-teams-plugins/kw
item.description: The old detectKW() in jade-harness reads ~/.jade/config.json kw_repo_map. It should be replaced with: import { detectKW } from "@jadecli/knowledge-teams-plugins/kw". The old kw_repo_map in ~/.jade/config.json should emit a deprecation warning.

item.title: Missing STO files for 4 VP seats
item.description: KW-01 (CEO), KW-06 (CMO), KW-11 (CSO2/Search), KW-12 (CRO2/Research) have sto: null in seats.json. These seats fall back to sonnet/medium defaults. Create s-team/ceo.md, s-team/cmo.md, s-team/cso2.md, s-team/cro2.md with appropriate model, safety_research, fitness_function, and budget_tool_calls.

item.title: Automated upstream sync GitHub Action
item.description: Create .github/workflows/upstream-sync.yml that runs daily: fetches anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins, diffs against upstream-ref.json commit, runs build+test, opens PR if changes detected. This is the core mitigation for the "daily upstream changes" challenge.

item.title: Automated dependency update workflow
item.description: Create .github/workflows/deps-update.yml that runs daily: npm outdated --json, npm update, build, test, commit if clean. Should handle major version bumps separately (open issue, not auto-merge). Zod v3→v4 is a case study of why majors need manual review.

item.title: Reconcile jade-harness-v2 with knowledge-teams-plugins
item.description: ROTS measurement, auth resolution, agent definitions, and tweakcc integration exist in both repos. jade-harness should merge INTO knowledge-teams-plugins as src/jade/ — which is where the SDK integration code already lives.

item.title: Model ID update strategy
item.description: When Anthropic releases claude-opus-4-7 or claude-sonnet-4-7: - Update s-team/*.md STO frontmatter (10 files) - Update src/jade/auth/resolve.ts DEFAULT_MODELS - deriveEffort() substring matching survives version bumps automatically - seats.json defaults.model needs update Consider extracting model IDs into a single models.json config.

item.title: Integration test for detectKWFromCwd()
item.description: Currently only unit tests exist. detectKWFromCwd() shells out to git and is not tested. Add an integration test that creates a temp git repo with a configured remote and validates detection.
